column1: Hey austin, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Cool I got you. which destination were you lookin to book
I was looking for cabo, but wouldn't be opposed to any of the other destinations if there's some good deals.
yea Cabo is a vibe. its def more on the expensive side but worth it. Punta Cana and Cancun have also been popular
how many ppl in your group so far?
what's the price difference between cabo and punta cana?
Yea that's solid. And it's lowkey like 300-400 diff
Which school you all from? I'll hook it up with a group rate the best I can
Oh bet yea we got a few groups from there rollin with us. Will def hook it up
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
asap, but i gotta double check with all the fellas yk how that goes lmao
Lol okay bet yea I feel you. I'll send what we have at the moment and add a payment plan. lets you reserve things with a deposit and then pay the rest off in a few weeks
Is it cool if I send most of it through email? It's a little long for text
Dope what's the best email to send to
bet I got you one sec
just sent that over lmk if you got it
Bet lmk what the group thinks
yoo Austin whats good bro, how we feelin about those options so far?
cabo's lookin good bro, we're trying to figure out the flight situation rn
okay bet, which airport you lookin to fly out of? I can help y'all
we're looking for the cheapest between jfk or albany, my boys mom is a flight attendant so we're trying to work some stuff out rn
oh y'all got that! she'll def be able to hook it up
yeah hopefully lmao that would be clutch
yerr Austin whats good bro, did we wanna lock down that Cabo option?
yo what's up i got 5 guys locked in just waiting on 1
quick question tho so how does the transportation from the airport work , also j to make sure it's all inclusive right?

yoo! aight dope. and yea soon as we get things started and you hop on the reservation you'll see a flight info tab on your account. you add your flight details to that and our operations team takes that and sets up your transportation for when you land and for departure. super smooth process
did we want to get the 5 of y'all settled? we can always add the one more afterward. that way y'all dont miss out
is there a specific deadline you recommend to deposit by or is it just recommended asap
honestly asap bro. things can sell out any moment without warning
yoo checkin in bro, did we wanna lock in our spots?
yerr whats good Austin, how things lookin on your end?
what's up bro does the rate get cheaper with more
yoo. not really, the rate is based on room occupancy. so like the cheapest price per person is at 4 in a room
if you have a group of 15 + then I can get you in on our ambassador program where you can earn a free tay or spread that amongst the group as a discount
gotcha yeah this dudes gf is buggin out so we might have to add her and her friend, so it just has to be atleast 6 or it dosent rlly matter just in general cuz if room occupancy?
dont really matter much. it can be however many people
yoyo any update on the group?
yo so it looks like we're gonna do the grand oasis cancun, if possible sorry to keep switching it up my friends can never make up there mind lmao. so how would the deposit work?
Yoo, all good bro. Next step I'll set up the reservation for the group, you each get to hop onto an open slot in a room, add your own details, and make your own deposit
bet, so quick question if only a few ppl deposit rn does it hold our spot? and also how does the room situation work if its 3 per room? and yeah its 6
Yea two rooms of 3. And how many ppl needed more time for the deposit?
Word that's straight. I can put the note on their 2 accounts
I'll get this started for you rn. Did we want 4 nights or 5?
lmk if y'all need any help getting on
yo is the deposit actually due today?
and how does the transportation coordinate with our flight cuz we didn't get a flight through u guys?
once you create your account theres a flight info tab. your enter your info right into there and our ops team schedules your transportation based on your arrival and departure times
and yea it is. lmk who the two guys are that cant today and ill make sure our operations team knows
whats good bro are y'all hopping in on the reservation
yoyo! whats the status on your end
yo myb so I sent them all the thing last night and our 6th bailed, but we found another one we just have to make sure he's locked. so is it chill if we lock that in tmrw and all get paid up tmrw?
aight bet. yea tomorrows straight I'll let the ops team know whats up
theyve been on my back about keeping this active lol
my bad bro everyone is just ducking around it's mad annoying
lol I know how it is bro. all good
yoyo, any update on the squad?
yeah, the one kid was actually in cancun already lmao he's flying home rn than we're all gonna hop on a call and do it
okay bet. he was on a fam trip? lol
work trip i think it was all paid for
yea thats wild. but yea bro lmk when y'all hopping on. im around for a call too if needed
bet and my fault again for this being dragged out so much, the guys need to lock in
yesssir all goodie bro. lets run it
yerr whats good bro, any update on what we wanna do? operations is asking about the reservation
so the guys flight got delayed yesterday so he got back td at like 5 am or sum shit so he's just been sleeping i'm bouta call him tho rn tbh
aight bet lmk bro, dont want you guys losing out on the rooms
yoyo, any word on what we wanna do?
yo , what would having 5 ppl change ? cuz i dont think its gonna work out with any of the ppl we'd have as a 6th, but we have 5 forsure locked in rn. what would the options be?
we'd just have you split into a room of 3 and room of 2, which is a little more expensive
you could either have the people in the 2 person room pay the difference or i could set it up so everyone is paying the same
it'd be better just to split it up evenly, how much would it be total?
did you want me to make that switch?
yes that's good thank you bro
actually one sec my one boy j said some bs as soon as i sent you a text😂 hold up
word lmk bro, def want you guys to get these rooms locked in
okay so it's four now, do the 4 person rooms have more than two beds
nah they usually come with just the two full/queen size beds, but you can always requests cots and extra blankets and stuff from the front desk
oh bet just let me see what they say do yk off the top of ur head what the price diff is
for 4 of you it's actually cheaper, it'd be 554 a person since we can do 1 room
ok dope i just updated your res, y'all can hop on it and lock in your spots
we got everyone but the one person all locked in he has to transfer money but the rest of us depod
aight word. he gettin that done tonight?
yerr whats good bro, you still owe a payment. Need you to get that in before operations removes you
got it i just did it
bet brotha! next step is if you haven't already have everyone toss in their flight info, so we can schedule airport transfers
okay i think i did mine, i thought it went for everyone ill let them know rn
word yea everyone gotta do it, so they know exactly who's arriving when
yoo are Nicolas and Daniel on thew same flight as you?
also were y'all lookin to add any part pass tickets to your packages?
yeah everyone is on the same flight i told them to add there stuff mad times no one listens to me
we were considering it, what comes with just the baseline that we have now party and event wise
word those flights were added in for them. and party pass is dope comes with express entry, cover charge, and open bar at our off resort hosted nightclub events
venues like D'Cave, Coco Bongo, HOF, Vaquita, Mandala, Mandala Beach, and more
word, can we do it when we get there? or once we're in cancun we can't buy it anymore
you can buy it in cancun yea I just dont know what the price or availability will be
yoooo safe travels today fam. gonna be a lit week
thank you bro, appreciate all the help
